uniqueWorkComments: Old C4 commit e1b7959 is a draft that was completely rewritten, expanded and verified in canonical C4 df98c13 with full production-grade tests, storage adapter mock coverage, and image resizing logic. No unique files or behaviors from e1b7959 are missing from canonical C4 / C5D.
closureRecommendation: PR #10 should be closed as superseded by PR #9 (delivering C3 via squash merge 1f8924e) and PR #11 (delivering C4 via merge df98c13).
